name: Header Icon
helpText: Emoji or symbol shown before the title.

name: Main Value Label
helpText: Label shown below the main number.

name: Annual Revenue Multiplier
helpText: Revenue per input unit (e.g. LKR per kWh). Applied to the raw value.

name: Lifetime Potential Multiplier
helpText: Multiplier for lifetime projection. Applied to the raw value.

name: Input Value Divider
helpText: Divide raw telemetry value by this number before calculations.

name: Auto-Scale Currency
helpText: Automatically abbreviate large values (K, M, B) for readability.

name: Show Delta vs Target
helpText: Show ▲/▼ percentage change vs a target value (2nd data source).

name: Show Status Badge
helpText: Show a threshold-based status indicator (On Track / Warning / Critical) based on annual revenue.

name: Warning Threshold
helpText: Annual revenue below this value shows Warning status. Leave empty to hide status.

name: Critical Threshold
helpText: Annual revenue below this value shows Critical status. Leave empty to hide status.

name: Tooltip Content
helpText: Hover tooltip text. Leave empty to hide.
default: Estimated carbon credit revenue based on energy generation and verified carbon standards.

name: Custom Accent Color (Optional)
helpText: Override theme accent color, e.g. #FF6B35. Leave empty for default green.
